<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Lumber Benefits — Benefits Admin Savings Calculator</title>

<!-- <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow"> -->
  
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    :root {
      --white:      #FFFFFF;
      --bg-page:    #F9FAFB;
      --bg-card:    #F2F4F7;
      --bg-subtle:  #F6F6F6;
      --border:     #D0D5DD;
      --border-lt:  #EAECF0;
      --green:      #40956B;
      --green-dk:   #2D7A55;
      --green-lt:   #7AECB4;
      --green-bg:   #EEF8F3;
      --green-icon: #AEFFD7;
      --orange:     #FF6F61;
      --orange-dk:  #E85D50;
      --dark:       #003333;
      --text-head:  #101828;
      --text-body:  #344054;
      --text-muted: #667085;
      --text-soft:  #475467;
    }

    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
      background: var(--bg-page);
      color: var(--text-body);
      min-height: 100vh;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }

    /* ════════════════════════════════════
       HELLO BAR
    ════════════════════════════════════ */
    .hello-bar {
      background: var(--dark);
      padding: 9px 0;
    }
    .hello-bar__inner {
      max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      gap: 16px; position: relative;
    }
    .hello-bar__text { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); font-size: 13.5px; }
    .hello-bar__cta {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      color: #7AECB4; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600;
      text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .hello-bar__cta:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
    .hello-bar__close {
      position: absolute; right: 32px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
      background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); width: 24px; height: 24px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      border-radius: 4px; transition: color 0.15s;
    }
    .hello-bar__close:hover { color: #fff; }

    /* ════════════════════════════════════
       NAVBAR
    ════════════════════════════════════ */
    .nav {
      background: #fff;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #EAECF0;
      position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 1000;
    }
    .nav__inner {
      max-width: 1248; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%;
    max-width: 1248px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
      height: 68px; display: flex; align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px;
    }
    .nav__logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0; text-decoration: none; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .nav__logo img { height: 30px; width: auto; }
    .nav__links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; flex: 1; }
    .nav-item { position: relative; }
    .nav-item__trigger {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      padding: 8px 12px;
      font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #344054;
      cursor: pointer; border-radius: 6px;
      user-select: none; white-space: nowrap;
      transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .nav-item:hover > .nav-item__trigger,
    .nav-item__trigger:hover { color: var(--green); background: transparent; }
    .nav-item__trigger svg { transition: transform 0.2s; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .nav-item:hover > .nav-item__trigger svg { transform: rotate(180deg); }
    .nav-panel {
      display: none;
      position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 6px); left: 0;
      background: #fff;
      border: 1px solid #EAECF0;
      border-radius: 14px;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(16,24,40,0.10);
      padding: 16px;
      z-index: 999;
    }
    .nav-item:hover > .nav-panel { display: flex; }
    .nav-panel--product { width: 820px; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; }
    .nav-panel--product .panel-cols { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 0; }
    .panel-col { padding: 4px 8px; }
    .panel-col + .panel-col { border-left: 1px solid #F2F4F7; }
    .panel-col__head {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      padding: 8px 8px 10px;
      font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #40956b;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #F2F4F7; margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .panel-col__head-icon {
      width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: #AEFFD7; border: 3px solid #D0FFE8;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .panel-col__head-icon svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }
    .panel-col__head-icon--ai { background: transparent; border: none; }
    .panel-sub {
      display: block; padding: 7px 8px;
      font-size: 13px; color: #475467;
      text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px;
      transition: background 0.12s, color 0.12s;
      white-space: nowrap; font-weight: 700;
    }
    .panel-sub:hover { background: #F0FDF4; color: #101828; }
    .panel-strip {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr);
      gap: 6px; margin-top: 14px;
      padding-top: 14px; border-top: 1px solid #F2F4F7;
    }
    .panel-strip-item {
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px;
      padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px;
      text-decoration: none; color: #101828;
      transition: background 0.12s;
    }
    .panel-strip-item:hover { background: #F0FDF4; }
    .panel-strip-title {
      font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #101828;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .panel-strip-desc { font-size: 12px; color: #667085; line-height: 1.5; }
    .nav-panel--resources {
      width: 780px;
      flex-direction: row;
      gap: 0;
      align-items: stretch;
    }
    .res-cols { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 0; flex: 1; }
    .res-col { padding: 4px 8px; }
    .res-col + .res-col { border-left: 1px solid #F2F4F7; }
    .res-right { width: 220px; flex-shrink: 0; border-left: 1px solid #F2F4F7; padding: 4px 4px 4px 16px; }
    .mega-link {
      display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;
      padding: 10px 8px; border-radius: 8px;
      text-decoration: none; color: #101828;
      transition: background 0.12s;
    }
    .mega-link:hover { background: #F0FDF4; }
    .mega-link:hover .mega-link__title { color: var(--green); }
    .mega-icon {
      flex-shrink: 0; width: 32px; height: 32px;
      background: #EEFFF5; border: 1.5px solid #C6F6D5;
      border-radius: 8px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      margin-top: 1px;
    }
    .mega-icon svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: var(--green); }
    .mega-link__body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
    .mega-link__title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #101828; line-height: 1.3; transition: color 0.12s; }
    .mega-link__desc  { font-size: 12.5px; color: #667085; line-height: 1.5; }
    .audit-card {
      background: #0f1f38; border-radius: 10px;
      overflow: hidden; text-decoration: none; display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      transition: opacity 0.15s;
    }
    .audit-card:hover { opacity: 0.9; }
    .audit-card__img { width: 100%; height: 110px; object-fit: cover; display: block; }
    .audit-card__body { padding: 14px; }
    .audit-card__title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 6px; line-height: 1.4; }
    .audit-card__desc  { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 10px; }
    .audit-card__cta   { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: #FF6F61; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; }
    .nav-panel--customer { width: 480px; flex-direction: row; gap: 0; }
    .cust-col { flex: 1; padding: 4px 8px; }
    .cust-col + .cust-col { border-left: 1px solid #F2F4F7; }
    .nav-panel--company { width: 680px; flex-direction: row; gap: 0; }
    .comp-col { flex: 1; padding: 4px 8px; }
    .comp-col + .comp-col { border-left: 1px solid #F2F4F7; }
    .nav__right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .nav__app-login { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #344054; text-decoration: none; }
    .nav__app-login:hover { color: #101828; }
    .nav__contact { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #344054; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 12px; }
    .nav__contact:hover { color: #101828; }
    .nav__demo {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center;
      background: #FF6F61; color: #fff;
      padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 8px;
      font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700;
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: background 0.15s;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .nav__demo:hover { background: #E85D50; }
    .locale-wrap { position: relative; }
    .locale-trigger {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
      cursor: pointer; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 6px;
      font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #344054;
      transition: background 0.15s;
    }
    .locale-trigger:hover { background: #F9FAFB; }
    .locale-flag { width: 22px; height: 16px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 3px; }
    .locale-panel {
      display: none; position: absolute;
      top: calc(100% + 4px); right: 0;
      background: #fff; border: 1px solid #EAECF0;
      border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
      padding: 8px; min-width: 185px; z-index: 9999;
    }
    .locale-wrap:hover .locale-panel { display: block; }
    .locale-option {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
      padding: 9px 10px; border-radius: 6px;
      text-decoration: none; color: #101828; font-size: 13px;
      transition: background 0.12s;
    }
    .locale-option:hover { background: #F0FDF4; }
    .nav__hamburger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; padding: 8px; cursor: pointer; }
    .nav__hamburger span { display: block; width: 22px; height: 2px; background: #344054; border-radius: 2px; }

     /* ── FOOTER WRAPPER ── */
  .new-footer {
    background: #002b2b;
    color: #fff; 
    padding:   0rem 2rem 1rem 2rem;
  }

  .footer11_component {
    padding: 80px 0 0 0;
  }

  .container-large{
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1248px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;

  }

    max-width: 1200px;

  /* ── TOP WRAPPER GRID ── */
  .footer11_top-wrapper {
    display: grid;
    /* grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr; */
    gap: 48px;
    padding-bottom: 48px;
    grid-column-gap: 4vw;
    grid-template-rows: auto;
    grid-template-columns: .5fr 1fr;
    align-items: start;
  }


  /* ── LEFT COLUMN ── */
  .footer11_left-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
  }

  .margin-bottom.margin-medium { margin-bottom: 24px; }

  }

  .footer-last-text {

    color: #eaecf0;
    /* max-width: 260px; */
  }

  /* login CTA */
  .login-lumberapp_cta-container { }

    display: inline-flex;

    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: opacity 0.2s;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .login-lumberapp_cta:hover { opacity: 0.8; }
  .login-lumberapp_cta .icon svg { display: block; }

  /* App store badges */
  .play-store-holder {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .play-store-holder a { display: inline-block; }
  .play-store-holder img 
  {max-width: 100%;
     /* height: 36px;  */
    width: auto; display: block; }

  /* Social icons */
  .footer11_social-list {
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .footer11_social-link-2 {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .footer11_social-link-2:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); }
  .icon-embed-xsmall-3 svg { display: block; }

  /* Badges */
  .div-block-badge {
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    margin-top: 8px;
  }
  .max-height_84 { height: 56px; width: auto; display: block; }

  /* Summarize AI */
  .ai-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 32px;
  }
  .summarize-ai {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #98a2b3;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .ai-wrap {
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .ai-link {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    color: #98a2b3;
  }
  .ai-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color: #fff; }
  .ai-link svg { display: block; }

  /* ── RIGHT MENU WRAPPER ── */
  .footer11_menu-wrapper {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .nav_product_nav {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .footer11_link-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    /* gap: 8px; */
  }

  .foooter-heading {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #85888e;
    /* text-transform: uppercase; */
    /* letter-spacing: 0.06em; */
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .opacity_0 { opacity: 0; }

  .footer11_link {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #eaecf0;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none;
    line-height: 1.5;
    transition: color 0.2s;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .footer11_link:hover { color: #7aecb4; }

  .hide { display: none !important; }

  .extra-top-m { margin-top: 20px; }
  .pad-16 { padding-top: 0; }

  .div-block-68 {
    display: flex;

  }

  .hide-on-ca { }

  /* ── FOOTER LINE ── */
  .footer-line {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    margin: 0 24px;
  }

  /* ── BOTTOM BAR ── */
  .footer11_bottom-wrapper {
    padding: 20px 24px;
  }

  .container_lumber-footer {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .footer11_credit-text {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #667085;
  }

  .footer11_legal-list {
    display: flex;
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .footer11_legal-link {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #667085;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .footer11_legal-link:hover { color: #7aecb4; }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .footer11_top-wrapper {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    .footer11_left-wrapper {
      max-width: 500px;
    }
    .footer-last-text { max-width: 100%; }
    .footer11_menu-wrapper {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .footer11_menu-wrapper {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }
    .container_lumber-footer {
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: flex-start;
    }
  }

    /* ── MAIN ── */
    .main {
      max-width: 860px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 56px 24px 90px;
    }

    /* ── PHASES ── */
    .phase { display: none; animation: fadeIn 0.35s ease; }
    .phase.active { display: block; }
    @keyframes fadeIn {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); }
      to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    /* ── EYEBROW ── */
    .eyebrow {
      font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 1.2px; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 14px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    }
    .eyebrow::before {
      content: ''; width: 20px; height: 2px;
      background: var(--green); border-radius: 1px;
      display: inline-block;
    }

    /* ── PHASE 1: INPUTS ── */
    .hero {
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 48px;
    }
    .hero .eyebrow { justify-content: center; }
    .hero .eyebrow::before { display: none; }
    .hero h1 {
      font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800;
      line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -1px;
      max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto 20px;
      color: var(--text-head);
    }
    .hero h1 em { font-style: normal; color: var(--green); }
    .hero p {
      font-size: 0.96rem; color: var(--text-soft);
      line-height: 1.7; max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .input-card {
      background: var(--white);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 16px;
      padding: 44px 52px;
      max-width: 680px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    }
    .input-group { margin-bottom: 36px; }
    .input-group label {
      display: block;
      font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-head); margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .input-group .hint {
      font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted);
      font-weight: 400; margin-left: 8px;
    }

    /* Slider */
    .slider-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; }
    .slider-wrap { flex: 1; }
    input[type="range"] {
      width: 100%; height: 6px;
      -webkit-appearance: none;
      appearance: none;
      background: var(--border-lt);
      border-radius: 3px; outline: none; cursor: pointer;
    }
    input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
      -webkit-appearance: none;
      appearance: none;

<script>
const state = { headcount:250, carriers:5, variableHour:true };

const BROKER_IMPL=90, EMPLOYER_IMPL=67, BROKER_YR2=21, EMPLOYER_YR2=20;
const BROKER_MONTHLY_HC=18.5, BROKER_MONTHLY_CAR=4.0;
const EMP_MONTHLY_HC=28.125, EMP_MONTHLY_CAR=1.0, EMP_MONTHLY_ACA=2.0;
const BASE_HC=250, BASE_CAR=5;
const SAL_BROKER=72000, SAL_EMPLOYER=88000, BURDEN=1.25, WRK_HRS=2080;

function calcSavings(){
  const hcR=state.headcount/BASE_HC, carR=state.carriers/BASE_CAR;
  const brokerMo=(BROKER_MONTHLY_HC*hcR)+(BROKER_MONTHLY_CAR*carR);
  const acaMo=state.variableHour?(EMP_MONTHLY_ACA*hcR):0;
  const employerMo=(EMP_MONTHLY_HC*hcR)+(EMP_MONTHLY_CAR*carR)+acaMo;
  const brokerAnn=BROKER_IMPL+BROKER_YR2+brokerMo*12;
  const employerAnn=EMPLOYER_IMPL+EMPLOYER_YR2+employerMo*12;
  const cB=(SAL_BROKER*BURDEN/WRK_HRS)*brokerAnn;
  const cE=(SAL_EMPLOYER*BURDEN/WRK_HRS)*employerAnn;
  return { broker:Math.round(brokerAnn), employer:Math.round(employerAnn), total:Math.round(brokerAnn+employerAnn), brokerCost:Math.round(cB), employerCost:Math.round(cE), totalCost:Math.round(cB+cE) };
}
function updateHeadcount(val){
  state.headcount=parseInt(val);
  document.getElementById('hc-display').textContent=parseInt(val)>=2000?'2,000+':parseInt(val).toLocaleString();
}
function adjustCarriers(d){ state.carriers=Math.max(1,Math.min(20,state.carriers+d)); document.getElementById('carriers-display').textContent=state.carriers; }

function setVariable(val){
  state.variableHour = val;
  document.getElementById('var-yes').classList.toggle('active', val);
  document.getElementById('var-no').classList.toggle('active', !val);
  document.getElementById('var-sub').textContent = val
    ? 'ACA hour tracking adds significant admin burden for construction employers.'
    : 'No ACA tracking burden — your savings estimate reflects this.';
}

function showLeadCapture(){
  const r = calcSavings();
  document.getElementById('preview-total').textContent = r.total.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('preview-cost').textContent  = '$' + Math.round(r.totalCost / 1000) + 'k+';
  document.getElementById('preview-days').textContent  = (r.total / 12 / 8).toFixed(1);
  switchPhase('phase2');
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

function showResults() {
  const name    = document.getElementById('lead-name').value.trim();
  const company = document.getElementById('lead-company').value.trim();
  const email   = document.getElementById('lead-email').value.trim();
  const errEl   = document.getElementById('form-error');
  const emailOk = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email);

  if (!name || !company || !email || !emailOk) {
    errEl.style.display = 'block';
    return;
  }
  errEl.style.display = 'none';

  const firstName = name.split(' ')[0];
  const r = calcSavings();

  document.getElementById('results-greeting').textContent  = `Here are your personalized results, ${firstName}`;
  document.getElementById('result-headline-hrs').textContent = r.total.toLocaleString() + ' hours';

  document.getElementById('r-broker-hrs').textContent   = r.broker.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('r-employer-hrs').textContent = r.employer.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('r-total-hrs').textContent    = r.total.toLocaleString();

  document.getElementById('r-b-days-mo').textContent  = (r.broker   / 12 / 8).toFixed(1) + ' days';
  document.getElementById('r-e-days-mo').textContent  = (r.employer / 12 / 8).toFixed(1) + ' days';
  document.getElementById('r-b-wks').textContent      = (r.broker   / 40).toFixed(1) + ' weeks';
  document.getElementById('r-e-wks').textContent      = (r.employer / 40).toFixed(1) + ' weeks';
  document.getElementById('r-b-hrs-wk').textContent   = (r.broker   / 52).toFixed(1) + ' hrs';
  document.getElementById('r-e-hrs-wk').textContent   = (r.employer / 52).toFixed(1) + ' hrs';

  document.getElementById('r-broker-cost').textContent   = '$' + r.brokerCost.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('r-employer-cost').textContent = '$' + r.employerCost.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('r-total-cost').textContent    = '$' + r.totalCost.toLocaleString();

  const hcLabel = state.headcount >= 2000 ? '2,000+' : state.headcount.toLocaleString();
  document.getElementById('r-config-hc').textContent  = hcLabel + ' employees';
  document.getElementById('r-config-car').textContent = state.carriers + ' carrier' + (state.carriers !== 1 ? 's' : '');

  switchPhase('phase3');
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

function switchPhase(id){
  document.querySelectorAll('.phase').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
}
</script>

    document.getElementById('r-employer-cost').textContent = '$' + r.employerCost.toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('r-total-cost').textContent    = '$' + r.totalCost.toLocaleString();

    const hcLabel = state.headcount >= 2000 ? '2,000+' : state.headcount.toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('r-config-hc').textContent  = hcLabel + ' employees';
    document.getElementById('r-config-car').textContent = state.carriers + ' carrier' + (state.carriers !== 1 ? 's' : '');

    switchPhase('phase3');
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
  }

  // ✅ Listen for HubSpot iframe postMessage
  window.addEventListener('message', function(event) {
    if (
      event.data &&
      event.data.type === 'hsFormCallback' &&
      event.data.eventName === 'onFormSubmitted'
    ) {
      showResultsFromHubspot();
    }
  });

  // ✅ Load HubSpot form
  function loadHubSpotForm() {
    hbspt.forms.create({
      portalId: "24336868",
      formId: "0a3a1d20-3f85-4796-acd5-600de78e4623",
      region: "na1",
      target: "#hubspot-form-container"
    });
  }

  var script = document.createElement('script');
  script.charset = 'utf-8';
  script.type = 'text/javascript';
  script.src = 'https://js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js';
  script.onload = loadHubSpotForm;

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
      document.head.appendChild(script);
    });
  } else {
    document.head.appendChild(script);
  }
</script>
